children.label: A
children.text: in the case of any property subject to the tax imposed by chapter 11, the decedent, and

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of any property subject to the tax imposed by chapter 12, the donor.

children.heading: Gift-splitting by married couples
children.label: 2 Gift-splitting by married couples
children.text: If, under section 2513, one-half of a gift is treated as made by an individual and one-half of such gift is treated as made by the spouse of such individual, such gift shall be so treated for purposes of this chapter.

children.heading: Special election for qualified terminable interest property
children.label: 3 Special election for qualified terminable interest property
A
children.text: any trust with respect to which a deduction is allowed to the decedent under section 2056 by reason of subsection (b)(7) thereof, and

children.label: B
children.text: any trust with respect to which a deduction to the donor spouse is allowed under section 2523 by reason of subsection (f) thereof,

children.heading: Trust
children.label: 1 Trust
children.text: The term “trust” includes any arrangement (other than an estate) which, although not a trust, has substantially the same effect as a trust.

children.heading: Trustee
children.label: 2 Trustee
children.text: In the case of an arrangement which is not a trust but which is treated as a trust under this subsection, the term “trustee” shall mean the person in actual or constructive possession of the property subject to such arrangement.

children.heading: Examples
children.label: 3 Examples
children.text: Arrangements to which this subsection applies include arrangements involving life estates and remainders, estates for years, and insurance and annuity contracts.

children.label: A
children.text: has a right (other than a future right) to receive income or corpus from the trust,

children.label: B
children.text: is a permissible current recipient of income or corpus from the trust and is not described in section 2055(a), or

children.label: ii
children.text: a charitable remainder unitrust within the meaning of section 664, or

children.label: iii
children.text: a pooled income fund within the meaning of section 642(c)(5).

children.heading: Certain interests disregarded
children.label: 2 Certain interests disregarded
children.text: For purposes of paragraph (1), an interest which is used primarily to postpone or avoid any tax imposed by this chapter shall be disregarded.

children.label: B
children.text: such use is pursuant to the provisions of any State law substantially equivalent to the Uniform Gifts to Minors Act.

children.heading: Executor
children.label: d Executor
children.text: For purposes of this chapter, the term “executor” has the meaning given such term by section 2203.
